source.edition_note: Sutra text unit from BS_C01_S01_V01_VERSETEXT_01 witness.

text.segmentation_note: Core sutra line for BS 1.1.1, separated from extended bhashya prose blocks.

translation.literal_translation: Then, therefore, the inquiry into Brahman.
translation.technical_translation: Given the required preparatory discipline, the proper undertaking at this juncture is Brahma-jijnasa: systematic inquiry into Brahman.
translation.interpretive_note: Athah is treated in the bhashya as signaling qualified sequence and rationale, not merely a decorative opening particle.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Signals commencement under a qualified antecedent condition
Normative launch of Vedantic investigation into ultimate reality

uncertainty_notes: Literal translation keeps the terseness of the sutra and leaves atha/atah exegesis to the bhashya layer.
Technical translation assumes the standard fourfold qualification context and should be checked against your house glossing policy.
